name: AutoTato
description: 商店/升级/箱子自动决策 + 内置配置面板。支持属性阈值限制、武器类别规则、中英双语。 / Automates shop, upgrade, and chest decisions with an in-game config panel. Stat thresholds, weapon category rules, zh-Hans-CN & EN.

godot.description_rich:
[EN]
AutoTato is a smart automation agent for Brotato. It makes decisions for you during shop, upgrade, and chest moments — following rules you set — while leaving you in full control at any time.

Features:
- Shop automation: auto-buy, lock-until-cursed, cursed-only, or reject per-item
- Upgrade automation: tier priority, stat priority, and forbidden stat filtering
- Chest automation: auto-take or discard
- Threshold limits: upper/lower/unlimited caps for 24+ stats (armor, speed, dodge, etc.)
- Weapon category rules: auto-buy rules per weapon class (melee, ranged, etc.)
- In-game config panel: 5-tab UI accessible via the AutoTato button in the pause menu
- Quality of life: turbo mode, auto-start next wave, keep running unfocused
- Multi-language: Simplified Chinese & English

Default behaviour: no rules = no intervention. Mod does nothing until you configure it.

[ZH]
AutoTato 是 Brotato 的智能自动化代理。在商店、升级、箱子三个决策点按你设定的规则自动选择（购买/锁定/丢弃），同时保留玩家手动的最终控制权。

功能：
- 商店自动化：按物品设置自动购买、锁定等诅咒、仅诅咒、拒绝
- 升级自动化：品质优先、属性优先级排序、禁止属性过滤
- 箱子自动化：自动拿取或丢弃
- 属性阈值：24+ 项属性的上限/下限/不限控制（护甲、速度、闪避等）
- 武器类别规则：按武器类别设置自动购买策略（近战、远程等）
- 游戏内配置面板：暂停菜单中点击 AutoTato 按钮打开 5 标签页 UI
- 便捷功能：急速模式、自动开始下一波、失焦保持运行
- 多语言：简体中文 & 英语

默认行为：未配置规则时 mod 不干预任何操作，行为等同于原版游戏。
